resources.string: Your profile will be sent to the contact who provided this link.
You will connect to all group members.
Please check if the Arpokrat link is correct.
Database migration in progress.\nThis may take a few minutes.
You shared an invalid file path. Please report this issue to the developers.
You are connected to the server used to receive messages from this contact.
Trying to connect to the server for this contact (error: %1$s).
Trying to connect to the server used to receive messages from this contact.
Only you and moderators can see this
Only the sender and moderators can see this
Messages are secured with end-to-end encryption.
Messages, files, and calls are fully secured with advanced end-to-end encryption.
Security Upgrade: Conversation now protected by an additional layer of quantum-resistant encryption.
You shared a one-time link incognito
Please update the app and contact the developers.
You already have a chat profile with this display name. Please choose another name.
This display name is invalid. Please choose another name.
No servers available to receive messages.
No servers available for private message routing.
No servers available to send files.
No servers available to receive files.
Fingerprint in server address does not match certificate: %1$s.
Please check your network connection with %1$s and try again.
Server address is incompatible with network settings: %1$s.
Server version is incompatible with your app: %1$s.
Fingerprint in forwarding server address does not match certificate: %1$s.
Error connecting to forwarding server %1$s. Please try again later.
Forwarding server address is incompatible with network settings: %1$s.
Forwarding server version is incompatible with network settings: %1$s.
Fingerprint in destination server address does not match certificate: %1$s.
Forwarding server %1$s failed to connect to destination server %2$s. Please try again later.
Destination server address of %1$s is incompatible with forwarding server %2$s settings.
Destination server version of %1$s is incompatible with forwarding server %2$s.
Without Tor or a VPN, your IP address will be visible to these XFTP relays:\n%1$s.
Please check that you used the correct link or ask your contact for a new one.
This link requires a newer app version. Please upgrade the app or ask your contact for a compatible link.

Unless your contact deleted the connection or this link was already used, it might be a bug – please report it.\nTo connect, please ask your contact for a new connection link and ensure you have a stable network connection.
Connection is blocked by the server operator:\n%1$s.
The connection reached the limit for undelivered messages; your contact may be offline.
Sender may have deleted the connection request.
Server requires authorization to create queues; check password.
Server requires authorization to upload; check password.
Fingerprint in server address does not match certificate.
Function execution taking too long (%1$d seconds): %2$s
To improve privacy, Arpokrat runs in the background instead of using push notifications.
It can be disabled in settings – notifications will still be shown while the app is running.
Allow it in the next dialog to receive notifications instantly.
Battery optimization is active; disabling background service and periodic requests for new messages. You can re-enable them in settings.
The app fetches new messages periodically – it uses a small percentage of battery. Arpokrat does not use push notifications; device data is not sent to servers.
Arpokrat cannot run in the background. You will receive notifications only when the app is running.
To enable notifications, please select App battery usage / Unrestricted in the app settings.
The app may close after 1 minute in the background.
To make calls in the background, please select App battery usage / Unrestricted in the app settings.
To receive notifications, please enter the database passphrase.
The database is not working correctly. Tap to learn more.
Xiaomi devices: Please enable Autostart in system settings for notifications to work.
App only receives notifications when running; no background service will start.
Checks for new messages every 10 minutes for up to 1 minute.
Background service is always running – notifications appear as soon as messages are available.
Error showing notification; please contact the developers.
To protect your information, enable Arpokrat Lock.\nYou will be prompted to authenticate before this feature is active.
Please remember it or store it securely – there is no way to recover a lost password!
You will be required to authenticate when you start or resume the app after 30 seconds in the background.
Device authentication is not enabled. You can enable Arpokrat Lock in Settings once device authentication is active.
Device authentication is disabled. Turning off Arpokrat Lock.
You can enable Arpokrat Lock in Settings.
It is likely this contact has deleted the connection.
This message was deleted or has not been received yet.
All reports will be archived for you.
This invoice requests a Testnet asset. Please enable Developer Mode in your Wallet Settings to pay it.
This is a real invoice, but your wallet is in Developer Mode. Please disable Dev Mode to pay it.
Wrong key or unknown connection - this connection is likely deleted.
Capacity exceeded - recipient did not receive previously sent messages.
Network issues - message expired after many attempts to send it.
Server address is incompatible with network settings.
Server version is incompatible with network settings.
Wrong key or unknown file chunk address - the file is likely deleted.
File is blocked by server operator:\n%1$s.
File not found - the file was likely deleted or cancelled.
Recipient(s) cannot see who sent this message.
The message will be deleted - this cannot be undone!
Messages will be deleted - this cannot be undone!
Messages will be marked for deletion. Recipient(s) will be able to reveal these messages.
The message will be deleted for all members.
The messages will be deleted for all members.
The message will be marked as moderated for all members.
The messages will be marked as moderated for all members.
The file will be deleted from the servers.
No direct connection yet; the message is forwarded by the admin.
The message may be delivered later when the member becomes active.
You are invited to a group
Messages were deleted after you selected them.
Selected chat preferences prohibit this message.
Only 10 images can be sent at a time.
Only 10 videos can be sent at a time.
The image cannot be decoded. Please try a different image or contact the developers.
The video cannot be decoded. Please try a different video or contact the developers.
Only group owners can enable files and media.
Please reduce the message size and send again.
Please reduce the message size or remove media and send again.
You can copy and reduce the message size to send it.
Report spam: only group moderators will see this.
Report member profile: only group moderators will see this.
Report violation: only group moderators will see this.
Report content: only group moderators will see this.
Report other: only group moderators will see this.
You can view your reports in "Chat with admins".
You will be able to send messages only after your request is accepted.
You cannot reply to this contact.
To send commands, you must be connected.
The image will be received when your contact completes the upload.
The image will be received when your contact is online; please wait or check later!
The video will be received when your contact completes the upload.
The video will be received when your contact is online; please wait or check later!
Your contact sent a file larger than the maximum supported size (%1$s).
The file will be received when your contact completes the upload.
The file will be received when your contact is online; please wait or check later!
Please wait while the file is loaded from the linked device.
Messages in this chat will never be deleted.
This action cannot be undone - messages sent and received earlier than the selected time will be deleted.
Delete chat messages from your device.
Contact will be deleted - this cannot be undone!
You can send messages to %1$s from "Archived contacts".
You can still view the conversation with %1$s in the chat list.
Receiving address will be changed to a different server. Address change will complete once the sender is online.
Address change will be aborted. The old receiving address will be used.
Encryption is active and a new agreement is not required. Forcing this may result in connection errors!
You must allow your contact to send voice messages before you can send them.
Please ask your contact to enable voice messages.
Only group owners can enable voice messages.
Send a live message - it updates for the recipient(s) as you type it.
You can <font color="#f85d4d">connect to Arpokrat developers to ask questions and receive updates</font>.
Add contact: Create a new invitation link or connect via a link you received.
If you received an Arpokrat invitation link, you can open it in your browser:
💻 Desktop: Scan the displayed QR code from the app via Scan QR code.
📱 Mobile: Tap Open in mobile app, then tap Connect in the app.
If you reject, the sender will NOT be notified.
The sender will NOT be notified.
Member is deleted - cannot accept request.
All messages will be deleted - this cannot be undone! Messages will be deleted ONLY for you.
All messages will be deleted - this cannot be undone!
List name and emoji must be unique.
All chats will be removed from the list %s and the list will be deleted.
The contact you shared this link with will NOT be able to connect!
The connection you accepted will be cancelled!
Your contact needs to be online for the connection to complete.\nYou can cancel this connection and remove the contact (and try later with a new link).
You will be connected to the group when the host device is online. Please wait or check later!
You will be connected once your request is accepted. Please wait or check later!
You will be connected when your contact device is online. Please wait or check later!
A new random profile will be shared.
To connect, your contact can scan the QR code or use the link in the app.
If you cannot meet in person, show the QR code during a video call or share the link.
Share Arpokrat address on social media.
You will not lose your contacts if you later delete your address.
Share one-time link with a friend
One-time link can be used with one contact only - share in person or via any messenger.
You can set a connection name to remember who the link was shared with.
Arpokrat address and one-time links are safe to share via any messenger.
To ensure your link has not been replaced, you can compare contact security codes.
Read more in the <font color="#f85d4d">User Guide</font>.
This text is not a connection link!
Your connection was moved to %s, but an error occurred when switching profiles.
You can view the invitation link again in connection details.
The text you pasted is not an Arpokrat link.
The scanned code is not an Arpokrat link QR code.
To use another profile after a connection attempt, delete the chat and use the link again.
Scan the security code from your contact app.
To verify end-to-end encryption, compare (or scan) the code with your contact.
Check the server address and try again.
Servers for new connections of your current chat profile
Saved WebRTC ICE servers will be removed.
Ensure WebRTC ICE server addresses are in the correct format, line-separated, and unique.
Use different proxy credentials for each profile.
Use different proxy credentials for each connection.
Do not use credentials with proxy.
Your credentials may be sent unencrypted.
Access servers via SOCKS proxy on port %d? Proxy must be started before enabling this option.
If confirmed, messaging servers can see your IP address, and your provider can see which servers you connect to.
Onion hosts will be used when available.
Onion hosts will not be used.
Onion hosts required for connection.\nNote: you will not be able to connect to servers without an .onion address.
A separate TCP connection (and SOCKS credential) will be used for each chat profile.
New SOCKS credentials will be used every time the app starts.
New SOCKS credentials will be used for each server.
A separate TCP connection (and SOCKS credential) will be used for each contact and group member.\nNote: many connections may increase battery and data consumption.
Set Use .onion hosts to No if the SOCKS proxy does not support them.
Note: messaging and file relays use SOCKS proxy. Calls and link previews use direct connections.
Use private routing with unknown servers.
Use private routing with unknown servers when IP is not protected.
Send messages directly if your or the destination server does not support private routing.
Send messages directly when the IP is protected and private routing is unsupported.
Do NOT send messages directly, even if private routing is unsupported.
To protect your IP address, private routing uses your SMP servers to deliver messages.
Use TCP port %1$s when no port is specified.
Use TCP port 443 for preset servers only.
Downloading app update, do not close the app
Enable periodic checks for Stable or Beta versions to stay updated.
Database IDs and Transport isolation options.
Notifications will stop working until you relaunch the app.
All your contacts will remain connected.
All contacts will remain connected. A profile update will be sent.
Add an address to your profile so contacts can share it. A profile update will be sent.
A profile update will be sent to your contacts.
Add your team members to the conversations.
The address will be shortened and your profile will be shared through it.
The link will be shortened and the group profile will be shared through it.
Your profile is stored on your device and shared only with contacts. Arpokrat servers cannot see it.
To reveal your hidden profile, enter the full password in the search field of "Your chat profiles".
Your profile, contacts, and messages are stored on your device.
Your profile is only shared with your contacts.
You can use markdown to format messages:
A default web browser is required for calls. Please configure one in system settings.
Find this permission in Android settings and grant it manually.
Error initializing WebView. Please update your system or contact developers.\nError: %s
Error initializing WebView. Ensure it is installed and supports arm64 architecture.\nError: %s
No phone number or email required. You are completely invisible.
Send and receive money seamlessly inside your chats.
Quantum-resistant end-to-end encryption. You alone hold the keys.
No phone number or email required. You are completely invisible.
Send and receive money seamlessly, directly inside your chats.
Quantum-resistant end-to-end encryption. Only you hold the keys.
Arpokrat does not use user IDs. It uses temporary, anonymous queues for message routing.
Only your devices store your contacts, groups, and end-to-end encrypted messages.
All messages, files, and calls are encrypted by default, preventing interception by network relays.
How do you want to receive messages?
Arpokrat does not use Google or Apple push servers. Messages are fetched directly from your relays.
Recommended. Get messages instantly in the background.
Only receive messages when the app is open.
Arpokrat includes a built-in secure wallet. Do you want to activate it now?
Create a Master Password to encrypt your app and wallet on this device. We cannot recover it if forgotten.

Last Updated: May 8, 2026

Arpokrat GmbH
Address: c/o Wadsack AG, Bahnhofstrasse 7, CH-6302, Zug, Switzerland.

If you are an Arpokrat user located in the United States or Canada, Arpokrat GmbH provides the Services to you in accordance with these Terms of Service.

To provide our Services (as defined below) to you through our applications, services, features, software (messaging app; digital asset wallet; OS), or website, we need you to accept these Terms of Service ("Terms").

Since the inception of the Arpokrat application, we have built our services on strong principles of security and privacy to ensure true digital sovereignty in the current historical context.

• Communication and Relays: We provide you with ways to communicate with others (messaging, voice and video calls, file sending) and to exchange cryptocurrencies via the integrated wallet. For the routing of your communications, we use relay servers (such as AMP, TURN, xFTP). These servers are blind: they transmit end-to-end encrypted data packets in volatile memory only (RAM-Only), without ever being able to read their content or identify the sender or final recipient beyond the immediate connecting IP address, which is not logged.

• Sovereign, Anti-GAFAM, and Zero-Log Infrastructure: To protect you from mass surveillance, the data routing for our messaging application transits exclusively through servers located in jurisdictions we have rigorously selected for their respect for privacy: Switzerland, Malaysia, Panama, South Africa, and Iceland. Your data will not transit anywhere else. Furthermore, we guarantee total technological independence: our relays never use the infrastructure of GAFAM, Big Tech giants, or any other company under U.S. jurisdiction. This entire infrastructure operates under a strict "Zero-Log" policy (no logging) and immediate destruction of encrypted packets after transmission.

• Security and Sovereignty: We ensure the security of our Services and combat abusive activities. However, to guarantee total sovereignty: no account creation is required, and no phone number or email is requested. You are identified only by a cryptographic key. We cannot identify you, identify your contacts, suspend your access, or read your messages. We encourage you to use our services responsibly and legally.

NO ACCESS TO EMERGENCY SERVICES: Our services differ significantly from your mobile, landline, and SMS services. They do not provide access to emergency services or their providers (police, fire departments, hospitals, etc.). It is your responsibility to ensure you can contact emergency services through other means.

IF YOU RESIDE IN THE UNITED STATES OR CANADA: OUR TERMS OF SERVICE CONTAIN A MANDATORY ARBITRATION CLAUSE. YOU AGREE TO RESOLVE ALL DISPUTES THROUGH BINDING INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION AND WAIVE CLASS ACTIONS (SEE THE DEDICATED SECTION BELOW).

• Guaranteed Anonymity: Arpokrat completely eliminates the concept of a user identifier. You exist only as a set of temporary cryptographic keys. The confidentiality of your communications is guaranteed, and it is impossible to access your geographic location.

• Age Requirement: You must be at least 13 years old to use our Services, or the age required in your country. If you are under 18, a parent or guardian must read these Terms with you.

• Updates and Fees: You agree to download and install updates (OTA, usually once a month), either automatically or manually. You are responsible for the costs related to your internet plan and your carrier's data fees.

Arpokrat places a high value on your digital sovereignty. No personal data is required to use our products.

Your personal data (name, email address, and country of residence) will only be requested when purchasing ArpokratOS, exclusively to comply with Swiss tax and accounting obligations.

• This data is not used for marketing purposes.
• It is not associated with the messaging application and is not shared with third parties (except for Swiss tax authorities).
• It is stored separately from our operating systems and is not linked to your cryptographic keys or your activity.
• In accordance with the law, it is retained for 10 years and then securely deleted.

Transparency: Arpokrat periodically publishes a "Warrant Canary" on its official website, attesting that, as of a specific date, no secret surveillance order or data seizure has been received. The failure to update this signal serves as a technical warning to the user regarding the integrity of the infrastructure's jurisdiction.

You must use our Services only for lawful, authorized, and acceptable purposes. Although we have no way to identify you or moderate your encrypted communications, failure to comply with the law or any misuse of our Services is your sole and entire responsibility.\n\nTechnical Architecture and Legal Compliance: Due to our Zero-Knowledge architecture, Arpokrat is technically unable to provide \"backdoors\" or facilitate the interception of communications. In accordance with the limitations set forth by laws such as CALEA (USA), we are not responsible for decrypting data for which we do not possess the cryptographic keys.

Your use of our Services is entirely at your own risk:

• Messaging App: Operating without a centralized account, your communications are end-to-end encrypted. The loss of your private cryptographic keys will result in the irreversible loss of your contacts and history. Arpokrat has no technical means to recover this data.

• Digital Asset Wallet: The integrated wallet is non-custodial. You are the sole holder of your private keys (Seed Phrase). Arpokrat does not have access to your funds and cannot recover them in case of loss. The purchase, sale (FIAT), and exchange (SWAP) of cryptocurrencies are provided by third-party companies and are subject to their own terms of service.

• Arpokrat Operating System (OS): Installing ArpokratOS replaces your device's original operating system. This technical process modifies the hardware and may void the manufacturer's warranty. Arpokrat disclaims all liability for any hardware malfunction or data loss resulting from the installation.

• OS Technical Specifications: You acknowledge that ArpokratOS is designed for defensive privacy. This includes the hardware and software disabling at the Kernel level of the Bluetooth, NFC, GNSS, and front-facing camera modules. The user's activation of the "Destruction Code" or "Panic Button" triggers an immediate and irreversible cryptographic wipe of all data. Arpokrat cannot, under any circumstances, be held liable for the permanent loss of data resulting from the user's use of these security features.

Disclaimers: We provide our services "as is," without any express or implied warranties (merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, protection from viruses). We do not guarantee that our services will be free of errors or interruptions. We do not exercise any control over how our users use our services.

YOU RELEASE US, AS WELL AS OUR SUBSIDIARIES, EMPLOYEES, AND PARTNERS (THE "ARPOKRAT PARTIES"), FROM ANY CLAIM, DISPUTE, OR DAMAGES, KNOWN AND UNKNOWN, ARISING OUT OF YOUR USE. IF YOU ARE A CALIFORNIA RESIDENT, YOU WAIVE CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE SECTION 1542.

Limitation of Liability: THE ARPOKRAT PARTIES ARE NOT LIABLE FOR ANY LOST PROFITS OR CONSEQUENTIAL, PUNITIVE, OR INCIDENTAL DAMAGES. OUR TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY WILL NOT EXCEED ONE HUNDRED U.S. DOLLARS ($100) OR THE AMOUNT YOU HAVE PAID US IN THE PAST TWELVE MONTHS.

Indemnity: You agree to indemnify the Arpokrat Parties against any third-party claims arising from your use of our Services, your violation of these Terms, or any misrepresentation made by you.

Except for users subject to the arbitration clause (United States and Canada), any dispute brought against Arpokrat will be exclusively subject to the jurisdiction of the Court of the Canton of Zug, Switzerland, and governed by Swiss law, without regard to conflict of laws principles.\n\nStatute of Limitations: Any objection or claim must be brought as an action (or arbitration) within one year of its occurrence, or it will be permanently barred.

• Availability: Our Services may be interrupted for maintenance, updates, or due to network failures or force majeure events.

• Territorial Restrictions: Our services must not be used in countries where doing so would violate local laws.

• Changes to the Terms: We may update these Terms. Unless otherwise required by law, you will be notified at least 30 days in advance of any changes. Continuing to use our Services constitutes acceptance.

• Severability: If a provision is deemed illegal or unenforceable, it will be modified or severed without affecting the validity of the remaining provisions.

• Export Control: The Arpokrat Software contains strong encryption technologies subject to international regulations. You represent and warrant that you are not a government end-user (as defined by 15 CFR § 772.1) and that you do not reside in a country subject to an embargo or export restrictions by the United States, Canada, or Switzerland. You agree not to export or re-export the Software without a prior license from the competent authorities.
9. Special Arbitration Clause (United States and Canada Only)

PLEASE READ THIS SECTION CAREFULLY. IF YOU RESIDE IN THE UNITED STATES OR CANADA, YOU AGREE TO SETTLE ALL DISPUTES THROUGH BINDING INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION (EXCEPT FOR INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY AND SMALL CLAIMS DISPUTES). YOU WAIVE YOUR RIGHT TO PARTICIPATE IN A CLASS ACTION LAWSUIT OR CLASS-WIDE ARBITRATION.

• Federal Arbitration Act: The U.S. Federal Arbitration Act governs the interpretation of this section.

• Notice of Dispute: Before initiating a proceeding, you must send us a notice containing: a) first and last name, b) mailing address, c) public cryptographic identifier, d) temporary contact email, e) description of the dispute, f) relief sought.

• Mailing Address: Arpokrat GmbH, c/o Wadsack AG, Bahnhofstrasse 7, CH-6302, Zug, Switzerland.

• Procedure: If the dispute is not resolved within 60 days, the arbitration will be administered by the American Arbitration Association ("AAA") under its Commercial Arbitration Rules.

• Opt-Out Procedure: You may opt out of this arbitration agreement by sending us a written notification to the address above within 30 days of accepting these Terms.

These Terms of Service may be translated into several languages for the convenience of our users. In the event of any dispute, discrepancy, or conflict of interpretation between the French version and any other translated version of these Terms, the French version shall prevail and be controlling.
Our relay network is positioned in sovereign jurisdictions selected for strict digital privacy frameworks.
No mandatory data retention for relay services.
Direct peering at CERN (CIXP). High-bandwidth capacity.
Ultra-low latency hub for Central and Western Europe.
IMMI laws engineered to protect whistleblowers.
Data Retention Directive declared invalid. Zero logging required.
100% renewable energy fiber grid with massive throughput.
Strategic bridge connecting Europe and North America.
Law 81. Legal isolation from US/EU frameworks.
No legal obligation to record traffic logs or IPs.
Connected to 7 major submarine cables (Hub of the Americas).
No retention requirements for transit data.
Cyberjaya MSC Status. Tier-IV data centers (ISO 27001).
POPIA Act. Constitutional right to privacy.
Retention does not apply to private relay nodes.
Home to NAPAfrica, the continent\'s largest IXP.
Critical geo-redundancy in the Southern Hemisphere.
Allow microphone access to make calls. End the call and try again.
Click the info button near the address field to allow microphone use.
Open Safari Settings / Websites / Microphone and select Allow for localhost.
Relay server protects your IP, but call duration may be observed.
Relay server used only if necessary. Other parties may observe your IP.
Enable lock screen calls in Settings.

This can occur if:
1. Messages expired on client (2 days) or server (30 days).
2. Decryption failed due to an old database backup.
3. The connection was compromised.
The hash of the previous message is different.
The ID of the next message is incorrect. This may be a bug or the connection is compromised.
This may happen if an old database backup was used.
Please report this to the developers.
The app will ask for confirmation before downloading from unknown file servers (except .onion or via SOCKS proxy).
Without Tor or a VPN, your IP address will be visible to file servers.
If you enter your Duress passcode while opening the app:
All app data, including your Wallet and keys, is permanently deleted.
App passcode is replaced with Duress passcode.
An empty profile with the provided name is created, and the app opens normally.
Entering this passcode when opening the app will irreversibly destroy all data, including funds!
This setting is for your current profile
These settings are for your current profile.
They can be overridden in specific contact and group settings.
Sending receipts is enabled for %d contacts
Sending receipts is disabled for %d contacts
Sending receipts is enabled for %d groups
Sending receipts is disabled for %d groups
Stop chat to export, import, or delete the database. You cannot send or receive messages while the chat is stopped.
The database is encrypted with a random passphrase. Please change it before exporting.
Your current database will be DELETED and REPLACED. This cannot be undone; all data will be lost.
Restart the app to use the imported database.
This action cannot be undone - your profile, contacts, and messages will be irreversibly lost.
Restart the app to create a new profile.
Use the most recent database version on one device ONLY to ensure message delivery.
This cannot be undone - all sent and received files will be deleted. Low-res pictures will remain.
%d file(s) with a total size of %s
This setting applies to messages in your current chat profile.
This action cannot be undone - older messages will be deleted. This may take several minutes.
You may save the exported archive.
You may migrate the exported database.
Notifications will only be delivered until the app stops!
Please enter the correct current passphrase.
Your database is not encrypted - set a passphrase to protect it.
Android Keystore is used to securely store the passphrase for notifications.
The passphrase is stored in settings as plaintext.
Database is encrypted with a random passphrase; you can change it.
Note: You will NOT be able to recover or change the passphrase if lost.
Android Keystore securely stores the passphrase to enable background notifications.
The passphrase will be stored in settings as plaintext after a change or restart.
You must enter the passphrase every time the app starts; it is not stored on the device.
Database will be encrypted and the passphrase stored in the Keystore.
Database will be encrypted and the passphrase stored in settings.
Database encryption passphrase will be updated and stored in the Keystore.
Database encryption passphrase will be updated and stored in settings.
Database encryption passphrase will be updated.
Store the passphrase securely; you will NOT be able to change it if lost.
Store the passphrase securely; you will NOT be able to access the chat if lost.
Database passphrase differs from the one saved in the Keystore.
Database passphrase is required to open chat.
Cannot access Keystore to save database password.
Passphrase change attempt was not completed.
Please enter the previous password after restoring. This action cannot be undone.
Passphrase not found in Keystore. Please enter it manually. This can happen after using a backup tool.
Passphrase in Keystore cannot be read. This can happen after an incompatible system update.
Passphrase in Keystore cannot be read; enter it manually. This can happen after an incompatible system update.
Database version is newer than the app, but no down migration available for: %s
Start the chat in Settings / Database or by restarting the app.
Chat is stopped. If you used this database elsewhere, transfer it back before starting.
You are invited to a group. Join to connect with its members.
You joined the group. Connecting to the inviting member.
Reception stopped. Chat history will be preserved.
Reception stopped. Chat history will be preserved.
Group invitation is no longer valid; it was removed by the sender.
Inviting contacts is not allowed when using an incognito profile in this group.
You are invited to a group
This contact is no longer available.
New member wants to join the group.
Please wait for moderators to review your request.
You cannot invite a contact with an incognito profile to a group where you use your main profile.
The group will be deleted for all members - this cannot be undone!
The chat will be deleted for all members - this cannot be undone!
The group will be deleted for you - this cannot be undone!
The chat will be deleted for you - this cannot be undone!
Anyone with the link or QR code can join. Members are not lost if you delete the link later.
All group members will remain connected.
Only group owners can change group preferences.
Only chat owners can change preferences.
Share this address to allow others to connect with %s.
This group has over %1$d members; delivery receipts are not sent.
The member will be removed from the group - this cannot be undone!
Members will be removed from the group - this cannot be undone!
The member will be removed from the chat - this cannot be undone!
Members will be removed from the chat - this cannot be undone!
All new messages from %s will be hidden!
All new messages from these members will be hidden!
Messages from these members will be shown!
The role will be changed to "%s". Everyone will be notified.
The role will be changed to "%s". Everyone will be notified.
The role will be changed to "%s". The member will receive a new invitation.
Connecting to contact. Please wait or check later!
You must allow calls from your contact to call them.
Please ask your contact to enable calls.
Send a message to enable calls.
Fix not supported by group member
Fully decentralized – visible only to members.
Your chat profile will be sent to group members.
Your chat profile will be sent to chat members.
Group profile is stored on members\' devices, not on servers.
Conditions will be automatically accepted for enabled operators on: %s.
Conditions will be accepted for operator(s): %s.
Conditions text could not be loaded. Review them via this link:
The same conditions will apply to operator %s.
These conditions will also apply for: %s.
To use %s servers, accept the conditions of use.
Servers for new files of your current chat profile
Updating settings will reconnect the client to all servers.
All chats and messages will be deleted - this cannot be undone!
You can hide or mute a profile - hold it for the menu.
You will still receive calls and notifications from muted profiles when they are active.
Incognito mode protects your privacy by using a new random profile for each contact.
It allows having many anonymous connections without any shared data between them in a single chat profile.
When you share an incognito profile with somebody, this profile will be used for the groups they invite you to.
Ensure the file has correct YAML syntax. Export a theme for a structure example.
Allow contacts to send disappearing messages.
Allow disappearing messages only if your contact allows them.
Expiration time is set only for new contacts.
Allow contacts to irreversibly delete sent messages (24 hours).
Allow irreversible deletion only if the contact allows it for you (24 hours).
Contacts can mark messages for deletion; you will still be able to view them.
Allow contacts to send voice messages.
Allow voice messages only if your contact allows them.
Allow contacts to send files and media.
Allow files and media only if your contact allows them.
Allow contacts to add message reactions.
Allow reactions only if your contact allows them.
Allow calls only if your contact allows them.
Both you and your contact can send disappearing messages.
Only you can send disappearing messages.
Only your contact can send disappearing messages.
Disappearing messages are prohibited in this chat.
Both you and your contact can irreversibly delete sent messages (24 hours).
Only you can irreversibly delete messages (your contact can only mark for deletion).
Only your contact can irreversibly delete messages (you can only mark for deletion).
Irreversible message deletion is prohibited in this chat.
Both you and your contact can send voice messages.
Only you can send voice messages.
Only your contact can send voice messages.
Voice messages are prohibited in this chat.
Both you and your contact can send files and media.
Only you can send files and media.
Only your contact can send files and media.
Files and media are prohibited in this chat.
Both you and your contact can add message reactions.
Only you can add message reactions.
Only your contact can add message reactions.
Message reactions are prohibited in this chat.
Both you and your contact can make calls.
Only your contact can make calls.
Allow sending direct messages to members.
Prohibit sending direct messages to members.
Allow irreversibly deleting sent messages (24 hours).
Send up to 100 last messages to new members.
Do not send history to new members.
Direct messages between members are prohibited.
Direct messages between members are prohibited in this group.
Direct messages between members are prohibited in this chat.
Members can irreversibly delete sent messages (24 hours).
Members can send files and media.
Up to 100 last messages are sent to new members.
History is not sent to new members.
Members can report messages to moderators.
Reporting messages is prohibited in this group.
Member will join the group. Accept member?
Delivery receipts will be enabled for all contacts in all visible profiles.
Delivery receipts will be enabled for all contacts.
You can enable them later via Settings.
You can enable them later via Privacy & Security settings.
The device name will be shared with the connected mobile client.
Ensure mobile and desktop are on the same local network and firewall allows the connection.\nShare other issues with developers.
This link was used with another mobile device. Create a new link on the desktop.
Only one device can work at a time.
Open Use from desktop on mobile and scan the QR code.
Desktop app version %s is not compatible with this app.
To allow mobile connection, open this port in your firewall if enabled.
Timeout reached while connecting to mobile %s
Connection to mobile %s is in a bad state
Mobile %s has an unsupported version. Use the same version on both devices.
Connection to desktop is in a bad state
Timeout reached while connecting to desktop
Desktop has an unsupported version. Use the same version on both devices.
This feature is not yet supported. Try the next release.
This is your own one-time link!
You are already connecting via this one-time link!
This is your own Arpokrat address!
You have already requested a connection via this address!
This is your link for group %1$s!
You are already joining the group %1$s.
You are already joining the group via this link.

Please report to developers: 
%s

Restarting the app is recommended.
File was deleted or link is invalid
Finalize migration on the other device.
Please confirm that network settings are correct for this device.
Chat must be stopped to continue.
Contacts, conversations, and files will be encrypted and uploaded to XFTP relays.
The uploaded database archive will be permanently removed from servers.
Choose Migrate from another device on the new device and scan the QR code.
Or share this secure file link
Warning: running chat on multiple devices simultaneously is unsupported and will cause delivery failures.
You must not use the same database on two devices.
Note: Using the same database on two devices will break message decryption as a security measure.
Confirm you remember the database passphrase to migrate it.
Check your internet connection and try again.
Starting from %s.\nAll data is kept private on your device.
You are not connected to these servers. Private routing is used for delivery.
Force message delivery by reconnecting all servers. Uses additional traffic.
Force message delivery by reconnecting server. Uses additional traffic.
Server statistics will be reset - this cannot be undone!
You can mention up to %1$s members per message!
Network error. Please check your connection.
Swap is not available in Dev Mode.
Buy / Sell is not available in Dev Mode.
This will completely remove the wallet from this device. Ensure you have backed up your recovery phrase.
Enter your 12, 18, or 24-word secret recovery phrase, separated by spaces.
Enter the following words to verify your backup.
Incorrect words. Please check your backup.
Your gateway to a secure, private, and decentralized economy. Only you hold the keys.
Customize explorers to view transactions. Use {hash} and {address} as placeholders.
Never share these keys. Anyone with them can steal your funds.
Never share these words. Anyone with them can steal your funds.
Balance too low to cover network fees.
You need at least %1$s %2$s to pay network fees.
